name: Yumi Ogura
description: 3-3 Classmate and a friend of Ayano.    ~!Ogura tries to kill Mei Misaki (to avenge her brother) at the class trip after being convinced by Takako Sugiura that Misaki was the "fake" classmate. Ogura falls to her death accidentally slipping out of the inn's second story window chasing after Misaki.!~
